_metadata.title: ComplianceLint Interim Standard for EU AI Act Article 72: Post-Market Monitoring
_metadata.disclaimer: This is an interim standard developed by ComplianceLint. It will be superseded when CEN-CENELEC publishes the harmonized standard for post-market monitoring of AI systems.
basis: EU AI Act Recitals 131-133 (legislative intent on post-market monitoring)
EU Decision 768/2008/EC -- New Legislative Framework (market surveillance)
_metadata.awaiting_standard: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for post-market monitoring of AI systems (expected Q4 2026)

requirements.title: Post-Market Monitoring System
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST establish and document a post-market monitoring system that is proportionate to the nature and risks of the AI system.
requirements.rationale: Art. 72(1) requires a documented, proportionate monitoring system.
required_content: Description of the monitoring system and its scope

requirements.title: Active Data Collection and Analysis
requirements.requirement: The monitoring system MUST actively and systematically collect, document, and analyse relevant data throughout the AI system's lifetime to evaluate continuous compliance.
requirements.rationale: Art. 72(2) requires active, systematic, and ongoing monitoring throughout the system lifetime.
acceptable_implementations: Drift detection and model degradation monitoring
User feedback collection and analysis pipelines

requirements.title: Post-Market Monitoring Plan
requirements.requirement: The monitoring system MUST be based on a post-market monitoring plan that is included as part of the Annex IV technical documentation.
requirements.rationale: Art. 72(3) requires a formal plan integrated into technical documentation.
required_content: Review and update schedule for the plan itself
